name: commerce.price-adjustment.apply
description: Apply price adjustments (discounts and fees) to line items

id.description: The client-defined ID for the line. This could be a UUID of the SKU, or a shipping method/package name. The value will be passed back unmodified in the calculation response.

quantity.description: The number of units being purchased.

subtotalPrice.description: The money amount for the total quantity being purchased.

type.description: The type of the calculation line.

value.description: The value, which might be: An integer for currencies like JPY that are not typically fractional; or, a decimal fraction for currencies like TND that are subdivided into thousandths.

adjustmentAmounts.description: The individual adjustments that were applied to the purchase. A combined summary of all of the adjustments that applied across all of the lines.

totalDiscountAmount.description: The total money amount of discounts calculated for the purchase.

totalFeeAmount.description: The total money amount of fees calculated for the purchase.

calculationLine.description: An individual line item that was calculated.

adjustments.description: The individual adjustments that applied to the line.

totalDiscountAmount.description: The total money amount of discounts calculated for the line.

totalFeeAmount.description: The total money amount of fees calculated for the line.

id.description: The client-defined ID for the line.

quantity.description: The number of units being purchased

calculationLine.description: An individual line item that was used in the calculation, passed back unmodified from the request.

adjustment.description: The adjustment that was used for the calculated amount.

calculatedAdjustmentAmount.description: The adjustment value represented as a fixed money amount.

appliedPercentage.description: The percentage applied by the adjustment, out of 100.

percentage.description: The percentage value of the adjustment, out of 100.

calculatedAdjustmentPercentage.description: The adjustment value represented as a percentage.

value.description: The value, which might be: An integer for currencies like JPY that are not typically fractional; or, a decimal fraction for currencies like TND that are subdivided into thousandths.

money.description: A money represents the monetary value and currency for a financial transaction.
